questionText:
把 0.0000807 以科學記數法表示。
Express 0.0000807 in scientific notation.

若 y = \dfrac{3x + 7}{x - 4} ，以 y 表示 x 。
If y = \dfrac{3x + 7}{x - 4} , express x in terms of y .

解 3^{x} = 80 （準確至三位有效數字）。
Solve 3^{x} = 80 , correct to 3 significant figures.

設 \alpha 及 \beta 為方程 3x^{2} - 11x + 2 = 0 的兩根。求 \alpha^{2} + \beta^{2} 。
Let \alpha and \beta be the roots of 3x^{2} - 11x + 2 = 0 . Find \alpha^{2} + \beta^{2} .
category: 二次方程的根/Roots of Quadratic Equations

questionText:
若方程 x^{2} - kx + (5k - 16) = 0 有兩個相等的實根，求 k 。
If the equation x^{2} - kx + (5k - 16) = 0 has two equal real roots, find k .

options.C:
k = 8 或 k = 2
k = 8 or k = 2
options.D:
k = 4 或 k = 16
k = 4 or k = 16

options.A:
x \le -4 或 x \ge 7
x \le -4 or x \ge 7

questionText:
某等差數列的第 2 項及第 6 項分別為 11 及 39 。求首 16 項之和。
The 2nd and 6th terms of an arithmetic sequence are 11 and 39 respectively. Find the sum of the first 16 terms.

某等比數列為 6, 12, 24, \ldots 。求第 8 項。
The geometric sequence is 6, 12, 24, \ldots . Find the 8th term.

求 4x^{3} - 2x^{2} + 5x - 3 除以 x + 1 時的餘數。
Find the remainder when 4x^{3} - 2x^{2} + 5x - 3 is divided by x + 1 .

已知 y 與 x^{2} 成反變。當 x = 2 時 y = 25 。求當 x = 5 時 y 的值。
It is given that y varies inversely as x^{2} . When x = 2 , y = 25 . Find the value of y when x = 5 .

某物品連續給予 20% 及 25% 折扣。求整體折扣百分率。
An item is given successive discounts of 20% and 25% . Find the overall percentage discount.

某數列為 10, 17, 24, 31, \ldots 。求第 16 項。
The sequence is 10, 17, 24, 31, \ldots . Find the 16th term.
category: 數列通項/General Term of a Sequence

questionText:
把 \$25000 以年利率 8% （每年複息一次）存入銀行 2 年。求本利和（準確至最接近的元）。
\$25000 is deposited at 8% per annum compounded yearly for 2 years. Find the amount, correct to the nearest dollar.

化簡 \sqrt{128} - \sqrt{32} 。
Simplify \sqrt{128} - \sqrt{32} .

在圖中，\triangle ABC 中， \angle A = 47^\circ 及 \angle B = 58^\circ 。求 \angle ACD ，其中 D 在 BC 的延線上。
In the figure, in \triangle ABC , \angle A = 47^\circ and \angle B = 58^\circ . Find \angle ACD , where D lies on BC produced.
category: 三角形的角/Angles in a Triangle

questionText:
在圖中， AB \parallel CD ，而一條橫截線與它們相交。已知圖中所示的角為 115^\circ 。求 x 。
In the figure, AB \parallel CD and a transversal cuts them. The marked angle is 115^\circ . Find x .
category: 平行線的角/Angles in Parallel Lines

questionText:
在圖中，一扇形的半徑為 21 \text{ cm} ，圓心角為 120^\circ 。求該弧的長度（以 \pi 表示）。
In the figure, a sector has radius 21 \text{ cm} and angle at the centre 120^\circ . Find the length of the arc in terms of \pi .

求點 (2, 6) 及 (10, 21) 之間的距離。
Find the distance between the points (2, 6) and (10, 21) .
category: 兩點間的距離/Distance Between Two Points

questionText:
求垂直於直線 8x - 3y = 5 的直線的斜率。
Find the slope of a line perpendicular to the line 8x - 3y = 5 .

求圓 x^{2} + y^{2} + 8x - 14y - 16 = 0 的圓心及半徑。
Find the centre and radius of the circle x^{2} + y^{2} + 8x - 14y - 16 = 0 .

options.A:
圓心 (4, -7) ，半徑 r = 9
centre (4, -7) , r = 9
options.D:
圓心 (-4, 7) ，半徑 r = 9
centre (-4, 7) , r = 9

category: 圓的方程/Equation of a Circle

questionText:
圖中所示為一個正九邊形。求每隻內角 \theta 。
The figure shows a regular 9-sided polygon. Find each interior angle \theta .

在圖中， DE \parallel BC 。已知 AD = 9 、 DB = 6 及 AE = 15 。求 EC 。
In the figure, DE \parallel BC . It is given that AD = 9 , DB = 6 and AE = 15 . Find EC .

求半徑為 6 \text{ cm} 的球的體積（以 \pi 表示）。
Find the volume of a sphere of radius 6 \text{ cm} in terms of \pi .
category: 立體圖形的體積/Volume of Solids

questionText:
若 11, 17, x, 24 的平均數為 20 ，求 x 。
If the mean of 11, 17, x, 24 is 20 , find x .

求數據 5, 8, 11, 13, 17, 20 的中位數。
Find the median of the data 5, 8, 11, 13, 17, 20 .

擲一粒公平骰子。求出現偶數的概率。
A fair die is thrown. Find the probability of getting an even number .

設 a > b ，其中 a 及 b 為實數。
I. a^{2} > b^{2}
II. a - b > 0
III. -a < -b
下列何者為正確？
Let a > b , where a and b are real numbers.
I. a^{2} > b^{2}
II. a - b > 0
III. -a < -b
Which of the above is/are true?

options.A:
只有 I 及 II
I and II only
options.B:
只有 I 及 III
I and III only
options.C:
只有 II 及 III
II and III only
options.D:
I 、 II 及 III
I, II and III

questionText:
設 x 及 y 為正數。
I. \log \dfrac{x}{y} = \log x - \log y
II. \log(x + y) = \log x \times \log y
III. \log(x^{4}) = 4\log x
下列何者為正確？
Let x and y be positive numbers.
I. \log \dfrac{x}{y} = \log x - \log y
II. \log(x + y) = \log x \times \log y
III. \log(x^{4}) = 4\log x
Which of the above is/are true?

options.A:
只有 I 及 II
I and II only
options.B:
只有 I 及 III
I and III only
options.C:
只有 II 及 III
II and III only
options.D:
I 、 II 及 III
I, II and III

questionText:
考慮二次函數 y = x^{2} - 14x + 58 。
I. 圖像的頂點為 (7, 9)
II. 圖像開口向上
III. 圖像與 x 軸相交於兩點
下列何者為正確？
Consider the quadratic function y = x^{2} - 14x + 58 .
I. The vertex of the graph is (7, 9)
II. The graph opens upwards
III. The graph cuts the x-axis at two points
Which of the above is/are true?

options.A:
只有 I 及 II
I and II only
options.B:
只有 I 及 III
I and III only
options.C:
只有 II 及 III
II and III only
options.D:
I 、 II 及 III
I, II and III

questionText:
設 ABCD 為一平行四邊形。
I. 兩雙對角分別相等
II. 兩對角線互相垂直
III. AB \parallel DC 及 AD \parallel BC
下列何者為正確？
Let ABCD be a parallelogram.
I. Both pairs of opposite angles are equal
II. The diagonals are perpendicular to each other
III. AB \parallel DC and AD \parallel BC
Which of the above is/are true?

options.A:
只有 I 及 II
I and II only
options.B:
只有 I 及 III
I and III only
options.C:
只有 II 及 III
II and III only
options.D:
I 、 II 及 III
I, II and III

questionText:
在圖中， AB 為圓 O 的直徑， C 為圓上一點，且 \angle BAC = 27^\circ 。求 \angle ABC 。
In the figure, AB is a diameter of the circle O and C is a point on the circle with \angle BAC = 27^\circ . Find \angle ABC .

考慮數列 6, 24, 96, 384, \ldots 。
I. 它是公比為 4 的等比數列
II. 它是等差數列
III. 第 5 項為 1536
下列何者為正確？
Consider the sequence 6, 24, 96, 384, \ldots .
I. It is a geometric sequence with common ratio 4
II. It is an arithmetic sequence
III. The 5th term is 1536
Which of the above is/are true?

options.A:
只有 I 及 II
I and II only
options.B:
只有 I 及 III
I and III only
options.C:
只有 II 及 III
II and III only
options.D:
I 、 II 及 III
I, II and III

questionText:
一組數據的每個數值都乘以 4 再減 6 。若原數據的標準差為 9 ，求新數據的標準差。
Each datum of a set of data is multiplied by 4 and then decreased by 6 . If the standard deviation of the original data is 9 , find the standard deviation of the new data.
category: 統計數據的變換/Transformation of Data

questionText:
設 A 及 B 為互斥事件，且 P(A) = 0.31 、 P(B) = 0.24 。求 P(A \cup B) 。
Let A and B be mutually exclusive events with P(A) = 0.31 and P(B) = 0.24 . Find P(A \cup B) .

把 7 件不同的物品排成一行，其中指定的 2 件物品須相鄰。求不同的排法數目。
7 different items are arranged in a row such that 2 particular items must be next to each other. Find the number of different arrangements.

某數列的第 n 項為 T(n) = 4n^{2} + n 。求 T(6) - T(5) 。
The nth term of a sequence is T(n) = 4n^{2} + n . Find T(6) - T(5) .

某測驗的平均分為 62 分，標準差為 14 分。一名學生的標準分為 -1.5 。求該學生的分數。
In a test, the mean is 62 marks and the standard deviation is 14 marks. A student has a standard score of -1.5 . Find the student's marks.

圖中的盒鬚圖顯示某分佈的資料。下列關於此分佈的敘述何者正確？
The box-and-whisker diagram in the figure shows the data of a distribution. Which of the following about the distribution is correct?

options.A:
分佈為負偏（左偏）
The distribution is negatively skewed
options.B:
分佈為正偏（右偏）
The distribution is positively skewed
options.C:
分佈為對稱
The distribution is symmetric
options.D:
四分位數間距為 40
The inter-quartile range is 40

questionText:
一個袋內有 6 個紅球及 3 個白球。同時隨機抽出 2 個球。求至少抽得 1 個白球的概率。
A bag contains 6 red balls and 3 white balls. 2 balls are drawn at random at the same time. Find the probability of drawing at least 1 white ball.

求數據 3, 6, 9, 12, 15 的方差。
Find the variance of the data 3, 6, 9, 12, 15 .
